name: software-modeling-workbench
description: 软件建模工作台（Software Modeling Workbench，基于 Markdown，支持 SPA / Electron / VS Code）

scripts.build: npm run build -w @smw/core && npm run build -w @smw/mermaid && npm run build -w @smw/mcp-server && npm run build -w @smw/web
scripts.build:mcp: npm run build -w @smw/core && npm run build -w @smw/mcp-server
scripts.build:vscode: npm run build && npm run copy:vscode-media && npm run copy:vscode-mcp && npm run compile --workspace=software-modeling-workbench
scripts.test: npm run test -w @smw/core && npm run test -w @smw/mermaid
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @smw/core && npm run build -w @smw/mermaid && npm run dev -w @smw/web
scripts.dev:electron: npm run build -w @smw/core && npm run build -w @smw/mermaid && npm run build -w @smw/web && npm run dev -w @smw/electron
